name: Bean Cornmeal Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups chopped tomatoes (canned tomatoes work, just drain them)
1 teaspoon mixed herbs (I cheated and used Mrs. Dash)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and green pepper in a little vegetable stock and water until tender (about 8 minutes).
2. Add tomatoes, beans, salsa, corn, spices, and simmer while preparing the topping.
3. For the topping:
- Sift together 3/4 cup flour, 3/4 cup cornmeal, 3/4 cup skim milk, 2 teaspoons baking powder, dash of salt, 2 teaspoons sugar, and dash of chili pepper.
- Beat egg white and stir into the flour and cornmeal mixture. Do not overmix.
- Fold in corn kernels.
4. Spread batter over bean mixture.
5. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
6. Serve with plain yogurt (reduced fat) and extra salsa on the side.
